subject: [PATCH pynfs v2 22/25] server41tests: test link triggers ADD notification

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite to verify that creating a hard link triggers an ADD notification on the directory's delegation. The test creates a file in a delegated directory, then links it to a new name from another client session. It checks that the server sends an ADD notification with the correct entry name when the link is created.
